title: Observability, Capacity, Flow Control, Alarms, and SLOs · Type-System Trace: Rabbitmq Core Metrics
summary: A dashboard shows only queue depth, creates message-ID metric labels, ignores unacknowledged work and oldest age, and responds to memory alarms by adding publishers and increasing prefetch. Planned artifact: Add and verify the rabbitmq core metrics increment in messaging telemetry, capacity, and SLO evidence board. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interpret ready, unacknowledged, total, ingress, delivery, ack, redelivery, consumers, consumer capacity, connections, channels, and node resource metrics together.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Predict Rabbitmq Core Metrics · Theory Rabbitmq Core Metrics
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory messaging team handles case 7723 in a partner publisher using an unroutable changed topic key. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to combine backlog state, oldest age, SLO, and resource alarms into bounded operations action; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
